title: decavenia micrantha
intro: Decavenia micrantha, also known as the small-flowered Decavenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is native to South America and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Decavenia micrantha are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to enhance its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
